title: Calendar
description: A calendar is a date grid for browsing months and selecting days — single dates, ranges, or multiple days — often embedded in forms and popovers.

title: Tabs
description: Tabs organize related content into labeled panels, showing one section at a time while keeping every option visible in a trigger row.

title: Carousel
description: A carousel is a UI component that displays a series of images or content in a scrollable area. It is commonly used to showcase products, images, or other content in a visually appealing way.

title: Accordion
description: An accordion is a UI component that displays a series of content in a vertically stacked list. It is commonly used to showcase products, images, or other content in a visually appealing way.

title: Breadcrumb
description: A breadcrumb is a UI component that displays a series of content in a horizontally stacked list. It is commonly used to showcase products, images, or other content in a visually appealing way.

title: Card
description: A card is a UI component that displays a series of content in a horizontally stacked list. It is commonly used to showcase products, images, or other content in a visually appealing way.

title: Dialog
description: A dialog is a modal surface that appears above the page to capture focused attention for a task, decision, or message.
